title: Internal Error when localparam is assigned by constant function returning a nested struct

features.name: localparam assigned by constant function returning nested struct
features.description: Code should include a localparam assigned by a constant function that returns a nested struct type with multiple fields

features.name: nested struct with multiple packed fields
features.description: Code should include a struct that contains another struct (nested struct) with more than one field in the inner struct
features.snippet:
typedef struct packed { logic [7:0] a; logic [7:0] b; } inner_t;
typedef struct packed { inner_t data; } outer_t;

features.name: constant function returning struct type
features.description: Code should include a function marked as constant that returns a struct data type
